response:
The controlling shareholder of the world's fourth-largest tyre manufacturer is **Continental AG**. 

Continental AG is the world's fourth-largest tyre manufacturer, based in Hanover, Lower Saxony, Germany. It was founded in 1871 as a rubber manufacturer and acquired Siemens AG's VDO automotive unit in 2007. Continental is also the controlling shareholder of **Continental AG** (itself), with 49.9% of its shares.
